parameters.url: ={{ (() => { const d = new Date($json.target_month + 'T00:00:00Z'); d.setUTCMonth(d.getUTCMonth() - 1); return $env.SUPABASE_URL + '/rest/v1/financial_actuals?month=eq.' + d.toISOString().slice(0,10) + '&select=*'; })() }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ from: 'Faith & Harmony <info@faithandharmonyllc.com>', to: [$env.FOUNDER_EMAIL], subject: 'Financial Data Needed: ' + $json.report_label, html: $json.email_html }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 8192, temperature: 0, system: $json.system_prompt, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.user_prompt }] }) }}

parameters.body:
={{ '--docx_boundary
Content-Type: application/json; charset=UTF-8

' + JSON.stringify({ name: $('Generate DOCX').first().json.filename, parents: [$env.GOOGLE_DRIVE_GOVERNANCE_FOLDER_ID || 'root'] }) + '
--docx_boundary
Content-Type: application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document
Content-Transfer-Encoding: base64

' }}
